race.comment: TORMANZOR (3) had been plying his trade in harder NSW contests before not being too far away at Ipswich last time out. Ready to peak now fourth run back from the break and must be respected out of the Archibald barn. Gets some weight off with the claim and can make his presence felt. MONTESQUIEU (1) has been thereabouts in all three Victorian outings and should find this assignment a touch easier. Looks very well placed against this line-up. I'M ON FIRE (7) strips fitter third-up and only needs some luck navigating from the sticky alley to be playing a role in the outcome. The well-related VERRY STELLA (10) (full to 11xG1 winner Verry Elleegant) rounds out the selections in a race with only a handful of chances.
